compiled_state.title: [test-plugin-boundary-rule]: NEVER-statement ordering false-positive -> CI test failure
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-plugin-boundary-rule.sh Assertion 1c fails in CI: 'NEVER-statement (line 101) does not appear before docs/designs (line 50)'.
Root cause: grep pattern 'NEVER.*plugins/dso|Never.*plugins/dso' matches 'Never hardcode plugins/dso/' at line 101 (Plugin path pattern bullet in Architecture section) instead of Architectural Invariant #3's 'NEVER place dev-team artifacts inside plugins/dso/' at line 146. The first 'docs/designs' reference is at line 50 (DSO NextJS template repo), before line 101.
Fix: Update Assertion 1c to use the specific pattern 'NEVER place dev-team artifacts' to target Invariant #3 directly.
